name: google-docs
description: Create, read, edit, and manage Google Docs. Link documents to contacts and projects. Export generated views to Docs.
standalone_features: Export HTML content to a Google Doc

features: Shared docs shown on entity pages
enhancements.description: Documents can be linked to contacts. Entity pages include a linked documents section.
Documents can be linked to projects. Project briefs show related documentation.

features: Export any generated view to Google Docs via /docs export
enhancements.description: Any HTML view (dashboard, entity page, project brief) can be exported to a Google Doc.
